items.summary: Debug and fix the YouTube channel connection flow in the ChannelConnection component (frontend/src/components/ChannelConnection.tsx) to identify why the OAuth connection process is not working as expected, ensuring users can successfully connect their YouTube channels

Verify and fix the useYouTubeChannel hook (frontend/src/hooks/useYouTubeChannel.ts) to ensure it correctly handles the YouTube OAuth flow, manages connection state, and communicates with the backend channel connection methods
Review and fix the backend YouTube channel OAuth storage method in backend/main.mo to ensure it correctly stores and retrieves channel credentials associated with user profiles

Add comprehensive error logging throughout the YouTube connection flow in both frontend (ChannelConnection component and useYouTubeChannel hook) and backend (OAuth storage method) to output detailed debugging information including OAuth callback responses, credential storage results, and any failure points
